proposal_text:
Title: Echo Detective
Concept: Hear the truth in every echo.
Website Product Description: Step into a world where silence holds the key to every mystery. "Echo Detective" invites you into a truly unique and deeply immersive investigation experience, unlike any you've played before. You won't just gather evidence; you'll listen. Using a groundbreaking sonic mechanic, players delve into fragmented memories, picking up the faint, residual echoes of past events. Piece together whispers, sounds, and emotions left behind to reconstruct crimes, understand motives, and uncover hidden truths. Every sound byte is a clue, every echo a piece of the puzzle. Prepare to challenge your perception and listen your way to justice in this fresh approach to crime and investigation.

Title: Emberbloom
Concept: Cultivate life. Reclaim humanity. Awaken your spirit.
Website Product Description:
Step into *Emberbloom*, a breathtaking post-apocalyptic world where fragmented floating islands hold the remnants of a shattered civilization. Your mission goes beyond mere survival; you are an architect of rebirth, tasked with healing both the devastated land and your own forgotten past.

Engage in "Dual Restoration" by actively cultivating unique, resilient flora – from glowing fungi to purifying roots – within hauntingly beautiful ruins, like submerged subway hubs. Witness the world visibly transform as you clear toxic air, filter murky water, and bring vibrant light back to the darkness. Your efforts will unlock new pathways, create safe havens, and uncover vital fragments of forgotten history.

But the journey runs deeper. Your spiritual growth, represented by a mysterious "unknown energy," is a tangible force that directly fuels your ability to rebuild and innovate. Simultaneously, embark on an "Awakening" within. Piece together fragmented memories, reclaim lost identity, and find purpose in a world stripped bare. *Emberbloom* offers a uniquely satisfying experience where healing the environment is intrinsically linked to rediscovering your true self, weaving a powerful narrative of resilience, hope, and profound personal transformation.
